name: pdf-reader-mcp
description: Read text, images, and metadata from PDF files via a single read_pdf tool. Parallel page processing, Y-coordinate content ordering, and absolute/relative path support.
author: allo-official

tools.name: read_pdf
tools.description: Extract text, images, and metadata from one or more PDF files. Supports page ranges, Y-coordinate content ordering, and configurable per-call flags (full text, metadata, page count, images).

notes: Read-only. Useful for letting agents read PDF reports that were exported from Excel. Pair with filesystem-tools bound to ALLO_WORKSPACE_PATH to keep path access sandboxed.
